title: The Man Who Fights Alone
writer: William Blacke, Jack Cunningham, James Shelley Hamilton
actors: William Farnum, Lois Wilson, Edward Everett Horton
plot: John Marble (William Farnum), a construction engineer is stricken by paralysis and begins to envision the growth of love between his wife Marion (Lois Wilson) and his best friend, Bob Alten (Edward Everett Horton). Bent on suicide...
